packet.title: Command Dash to Aeye Relay Proof
packet.intent: Prove Command Dash, ThinkIt, and TinkerDen can prepare an Aeye relay packet without making Ben the bus.
packet.context: Prove Command Dash, ThinkIt, and TinkerDen can prepare an Aeye relay packet without making Ben the bus.
packet.next_action: Petra validates the relay packet and returns a receipt to TinkerDen Intake.
evidence_required: Aeye response returned as FROM_* receipt
Operator manual Send confirmation if loaded into external chat
human_gates: Operator must paste/send manually in external Aeye chat
packet.failure_condition: No Aeye receipt returns, or packet is sent without operator manual Send.
rules: Clipboard + workspace focus only in V0
